flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 23 pp at Keiser University-Ft Lauderdale vs the 2018–2022 baseline (44.2% vs 67.0%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Keiser University-Ft Lauderdale rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($22.0k → $25.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Keiser University-Ft Lauderdale rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($22.0k → $25.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Keiser University-Ft Lauderdale fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.7% → 0.0%).
